9-12.PS2.A.1.shortSummary: Newton's second law connects net force, mass, and acceleration.
9-12.PS2.A.1.whyImportant: This helps you predict how changing force or mass changes an object's motion.

9-12.PS4.A.1.shortSummary: Wave speed depends on the relationship between frequency and wavelength.
9-12.PS4.A.1.whyImportant: This helps you use math to explain waves such as sound, light, and signals.
